title: Add support for the bridge network option com.docker.network.bridge.enable_ip_masquerade
body:
### Feature request description

Adding support for the bridge network option `com.docker.network.bridge.enable_ip_masquerade` would maintain compatibility with docker and allow the use of podman instead of it with scripts using this option.

### Suggest potential solution

the bridge should get configured with masquerading enabled / disabled.


### Have you considered any alternatives?

No

### Additional context

The request is similar to https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/15830

comments.body:
Before we can support such option we first need to support logic behind this.
What exactly does this option do? Does it only skip adding NAT firewall rules? I think this is tracked as https://github.com/containers/netavark/issues/831
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
